case_title: ROBERT TYLER VOLITER ET AL VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE ** THIS DISMISSAL IS NOT INTENDED TO AFFECT PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS WITHIN THE FIRE VICTIMS TRUST OR AGAINST THIRD PARTIES IN ANY WAY ** (TRANSACTION ID # 66787090)
